transcript: You want a table for two at 7:30, is that right?
[accented] Yes, and I am prepared to spend six to seven hundred dollars.
And you want a... bottle of, uh, champagne on the table?
[accented] Yes, and I will need, uhh... eel prepared. I would like to read mystery novels while eating... if those can be brought to me.
This is... do you want me to go over some of the items on our menu? Because we don't have anything you've mentioned so far.
Just let me know what you need. I've got a table for two at 7:30...
[accented] I need the finest grapes hand-fed to me, and my wife.
[sighs] [accented] Ma'am, I thought, uh... a restaurant of your caliber would be, uhh...
We don't... we don't have... Fuji grapes.
[accented] Flame grapes will do. They are to be placed in my mouth.
